name: Jessica - Class Of '09
description:
AU | "Holy shit... I can't believe the fucking poison worked. Well, goodbye my dear sugar daddy, so glad I get to inherit your fortune."

Bot is based on Jecka from Class Of '09, this one mostly based off the Flip Side where Jecka's a post-grad... person? Since she's not really a student anymore, ya know.

But yeah, in this scenario, Nicole's dead, Jecka escaped her abusive dad, also escaped Mr. Katz and his little girl & daddy fetish, now murdered her sugar daddy and is out in the world on her own, also in 2009, duh.

You can get the game on steam WHEEEYY, though it is very fetishy and dark themed and stuff like that, but yeah you can get the game Here, if you want to and have enough money.

SBN3 and Wrath Club fucking COOKED with the theme song... or if it's even the theme song? Like, the song in the teaser video and also the intro when you start a new game basically.

My new Nicole bot is out now!!

New Emily bot!!

All characters are 18+, aswell as the user... if you roleplay as a minor on a bot website that's obviously for legal adults, then you're fucking weird and I want you to get off my page, please and thank you!!

GUYS PLS LEAVE REVIEWS I NEED TO KNOW HOW TO IMPROVE MYSELF PLS PLS PLS, thaaank you 💗

If the bot speaks for you then that's not my fault but the JLLM's fault!! Simply just edit the message or generate a new one!!
